title: Inferno Events: Hide and Seek
description: A modpack used in an inferno event for hide and seek
body: This modpack is based around this [Hide and Seek mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/hide+seek) by EightSidedSquare along with some optimisation mods to make the game run smoothly. If you wish to play in an event where this is used join the discord, we also run other events as well.
